transcript: Serving nearly 8,000 students, the mission of the Tiff County School System is to educate, prepare, and inspire students to reach their fullest potential. From pre-kindergarten to 12th grade, our ultimate goal is to educate and produce graduates who will go on to contribute to the world. Using evidence-based practices in the classroom and offering numerous extracurricular outlets, our students are able to leave Tift County schools with a solid foundation for their futures. They go on to attend top colleges across the United States, serve in our nation's military, as well as directly enter the workforce. Combining what they learn from our staff with their natural talents allows our students to thrive. With instruction tailored to fit their needs, we are able to provide our students with a fantastic education. We offer everything from a special and gifted education to online learning, as well as honors and advanced placement classes. Many of our students are even attending college while still in high school. We are able to use state-of-the-art tools and technology to offer individualized learning programs. In addition to the classroom instruction, our students have numerous other opportunities to round out their educational experiences. From football to volleyball and chorus to the chess club, our students are offered numerous extracurricular activities. Our youngest students even get the opportunities to learn to speak Spanish, play piano, or even juggle. Our fine arts programs are top-notch, winning numerous awards and accolades. More than 2,000 students participated last year in non-athletic extracurricular activities, while nearly 2,000 were part of one of our athletic teams. And our varsity athletic teams regularly win region or state competitions, with many students able to go on to college on athletic scholarships. In order to offer such a quality education, you have to have a quality faculty and staff. 100% of our teachers are ranked as highly qualified. We offer above-average teaching supplements for our region and many leadership opportunities, including an Aspiring Leaders Program with easy access to professional development. We also have incredibly stable leadership with both our school board and school-level administrators. Our system is an active, important part of Tiff County. We believe in great partnerships and in giving back to our community that supports us so much. We have an partners and education program that benefits our schools and our local businesses we are also able to offer programs including dual enrollment to our students because of fantastic partnerships with abraham baldwin agricultural college university of georgia tifton campus and southern regional technical college our system employs more than 1 000 people and uses many local uses many local vendors and businesses, making a large economic footprint on the area. We also encourage our administration, staff, and students to volunteer their time in the community through our local chamber of commerce, charity, community clubs, and churches. We believe in engaging our students both in and out of the classroom to help them fill their unlimited capacity to learn. We take pride in our past and traditions and look forward to working towards offering our students more every day. Tiff County Schools, where tradition and teamwork create a brighter tomorrow.
